features.name: right_shift_by_max_int
features.description: Code should include right shift operation where shift amount is computed from bitwise NOT of a literal value (~31'b0 yields INT_MAX), which can cause integer overflow in synthesis tools if not capped to operand width.

features.name: shift_result_zero_when_shift_ge_width
features.description: Code should include shift operation where shift amount is equal to or exceeds the data width, which semantically should produce zero result regardless of operand value.
features.snippet: input signed [30:0] b; output [11:0] y = b >> ~31'b0;

title: Fix runtime error on shift by INT_MAX
